nodes.name: Raimondi's yellow finch
nodes.summary: Raimondi's yellow finch（Sicalis raimondii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Raimondi's yellow finch。

nodes.name: Raimondi's yellow finch
nodes.summary: Raimondi's yellow finch (Sicalis raimondii) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to coastal Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: Raimondi's yellow finch (Sicalis raimondii) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to coastal Peru.

nodes.name: Sicalis
nodes.summary: Sicalis（Sicalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Stripe-tailed yellow finch、Puna yellow finch、Bright-rumped yellow finch等13种鸟类。
